description: Bestiary achievement phrases (Phase 39). Source: docs/bestiary-spec.md §6. One short flavor line; the highest-priority applicable trait wins. 'priority' is the selection order (lower = higher priority), matching §6 top-to-bottom. SLICE 1 resolver triggers: pr, sRank, chimera, and the 7 dominant-line fallbacks. 'comeback' (needs dormancy signal — not threaded) and 'highVolume' (needs top-decile-sets signal — not threaded) ship as content but are not yet selectable; they become live in Slice 2. trait is the selection key. line-fallback phrases carry a 'line' key (BodyPart.dbValue).

name.pt: Você enfrentou muitos de uma vez.
Seu braço de espada se afia.
